name: mac-disk-cleaner
description: Free up disk space on Mac by clearing caches, finding large files, and getting smart storage recommendations. Works in any language.
author: MSApps (https://msapps.mobi)

pillars.supervised: Only touches auto-regenerated caches, never personal files
pillars.orchestrated: Scan → analyze → clean with size reporting
pillars.secured: Local filesystem only, no network access, no deletions of user data
